title: sir.action.v0
description: Correlated attributed action, output of the SIR signal normalization and attribution pipeline. This is the input to policy evaluation and the entity recorded in the ledger.

action_id.description: Stable action identifier derived from the case/request context.

mode.description: Protection mode active when this action was attributed.

action_type.description: Primary action type from normalized signals (e.g. shell_exec, file_read, network_connect, mcp_trust).

sensitivity.description: Highest sensitivity label across signal targets.

labels.description: Human-readable labels assigned by the labeling pipeline (e.g. credential_access, external_egress, shell_execution, dangerous_shell, cicd_edit, sir_config_tamper).

attribution.description: Attribution result. See sir.attribution.v0 for the full contract.

enforceability.description: Enforceability analysis for this action in the active mode. See sir.enforceability.v0.
